静态库镜像
首页 / artitalk

Artitalk

Artitalk 静态资源镜像

库名称
artitalk
官网
https://github.com/ArtitalkJS/Artitalk
许可证
MIT
最新版本
3.3.4
关键词
artitalk blog talk widget
选择版本

引用示例

CSS

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/dist/css/artitalk.min.css">

JavaScript

<script src="https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/artitalk.js"></script>

文件列表

文件路径 直链地址
artitalk.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/artitalk.js
dist/css/artitalk.min.css https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/dist/css/artitalk.min.css
dist/css/main.min.css https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/dist/css/main.min.css
dist/js/artitalk.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/dist/js/artitalk.js
dist/js/artitalk.min.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/dist/js/artitalk.min.js
src/css/main.css https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/src/css/main.css
src/main.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/src/main.js
src/plugins/av-min.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/src/plugins/av-min.js
src/plugins/browser.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/src/plugins/browser.js
src/plugins/md5.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/src/plugins/md5.js
src/plugins/showdown.min.js https://style-mirror.jsw.ac.cn/lib/artitalk/3.3.4/src/plugins/showdown.min.js
